name: Multi-Timezone Follow-up
description: Schedules follow-up emails based on the contact's timezone. Optimizes send times for MENA (GST), Levant (EET), and North Africa (CET) regions.
descriptionAr: يجدول رسائل المتابعة بناءً على المنطقة الزمنية للعميل. يحسّن أوقات الإرسال لمناطق الخليج والشام وشمال أفريقيا.

config.title: Follow up with {{contact.name}} (timezone-optimized)
config.description: Previous outreach sent. Schedule follow-up during their business hours.
